profile.name: Taleh Ibrahimli
profile.headline: Systems Engineer · Performance Engineering · Lead Software Engineer (Rust, C/C++, Go) · Distributed Systems

skills.value: Low-latency (1.2µs), Nano-latency, High-throughput (58M+ MEPS), Zero-copy, Lock-free data structures, False sharing/Cache-line optimization, Mechanical Sympathy, CPU/Linux profiling.

openSource.title: roda-ledger
openSource.description: A high-performance, durable, and crash-consistent financial ledger and transaction executor built in Rust, tuned for high throughput and low-latency transactional workflows.
highlights: Engineered a pipelined execution model (Core-Per-Stage) using lock-free ArrayQueues to eliminate thread contention and maximize mechanical sympathy.
Achieved a peak throughput of 2.79 Million transactions per second (tx/s) for deposits and 1.70 Million tx/s for transfers with sub-microsecond average latency.
Implemented strict durability via Write-Ahead Logging (WAL) and automatic state recovery through snapshot loading and WAL replay.

openSource.title: roda-state
openSource.description: Zero-copy, lock-free multithreaded pipeline in Rust designed for nano-latency distributed environments. Optimized for maximum cache bandwidth by bypassing standard multi-threading performance traps.
highlights: Engineered a zero-copy, lock-free multithreaded pipeline in Rust, achieving a peak algorithmic throughput of 58.7 million elements per second (MEPS).
Processed 24 million real-world MBO market data events with an unloaded median latency of 1.2µs, leveraging nano-latency level optimizations.
Optimized for CPU cache lines and eliminated false sharing by implementing block processing (read_window), reducing L1 cache misses to 0.73% and boosting IPC (Instructions Per Cycle) to 1.93.

openSource.title: apibrew
openSource.description: An open-source low-code backend-as-a-service that automatically generates REST/gRPC APIs and real-time event streams from data models.

openSource.title: logi
openSource.description: A framework for defining and parsing custom Domain Specific Languages (DSLs) with efficient AST generation and semantic validation.

experience.title: Lead Rust/Go Engineer
experience.description: Lead Software Engineer and Technical Lead for the EvenPlay project. Spearheaded technical vision and backend roadmap, managing a team of 8 engineers while maintaining a hands-on technical presence and ensuring alignment with organizational technical standards.
keyContributions: Architectural Leadership: Defined the microservices roadmap and organizational technical standards. Mentored senior engineers on Rust/Go/AWS best practices and distributed systems design.
Backend Engineering (Hands-on): Developed core high-load backend infrastructure using Rust and Golang, supporting 100k users and 4k RPS (Requests Per Second) at peak.
Cloud Infrastructure: Orchestrated large-scale EKS deployments using Terraform/CDK. Streamlined AWS costs by 35% through rightsizing and Spot instance strategies.
Engineering Excellence: Reduced deployment lead time by 40% and boosted code coverage from 40% to 85% by implementing CI/CD strategies and ADR processes.
AI & Vision: Engineered Python and Rust based computer vision services for real-time body/face detection integrated into gameplay, resulting in 60% reduction in cheating incidents.

Low-Latency Optimizations: Conducted ultra-low latency investigations and CPU cache analysis. Optimized hot paths for cache line alignment and eliminated false sharing to achieve nano-latency performance.
experience.impact: Delivered critical high-load components while scaling the engineering organization and improving delivery predictability by 80% for the EvenPlay project.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Spearheaded the design and implementation of security-first platform features, ensuring FIPS 140-3 compliance for global enterprise clients.
keyContributions: Security Architecture: Developed and implemented enterprise-grade security protocols using AWS CloudHSM, KMS, and PKI, enabling high-assurance data protection and onboarding of 1 Fortune 500 client requiring FIPS 140-3 Level 3 compliance.
Platform Scalability: Refined microservices for enterprise-scale billing cycles, achieving 90% reduction in processing time for large-batch jobs processing 10k-100k invoices daily.

Identity & Access: Orchestrated a centralized OAuth2/OIDC implementation across the microservices ecosystem, streamlining secure service-to-service communication and resulting in a 2x latency improvement.

Cross-functional Collaboration: Collaborated with 5 cross-functional teams to implement security features and platform enhancements, ensuring seamless integration and improved overall system performance.
experience.impact: Strengthened data protection posture to FIPS 140-3 Level 3 for Fortune 500 onboarding and achieved a 2x latency improvement in service-to-service communication.

experience.title: Lead Software Engineer
experience.description: Technical Lead for the architectural migration of Azerbaijan's largest payment gateway. Led the transition from a legacy monolith to a resilient, event-driven microservices architecture.
keyContributions: Architectural Migration: Orchestrated architectural migration from monolith to microservices, improving system throughput by 7x and handling 2k+ RPS at peak for 1M+ active users.

Strategic Leadership: Managed the engineering team, establishing ADR processes that increased team efficiency by 3x and reduced decision time by 5x, creating a single source of truth for architectural decisions.

Zero-Downtime Deployment: Designed split-traffic rollout strategies and comprehensive testing suites including unit, integration, and e2e tests to ensure 100% availability during core system migrations.

Security Fortification: Fortified system security by implementing robust security protocols, mitigating potential vulnerabilities, and protecting sensitive user data, resulting in a 90% decrease in security incidents.
experience.impact: Modernized the national payment infrastructure, delivering 7x scaling capabilities and 90% decrease in security incidents with zero downtime during migration.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Aurora Portfolio (CxProcess & M1 AlertFind): Drove the modernization of mission-critical alerting and process orchestration systems.
keyContributions: API Modernization: Modernized legacy applications by architecting a high-level API layer using OpenAPI spec, accelerating feature iteration by 80%.
Refactoring & Migration: Refactored backend services to align with new domain boundaries and RESTful API contracts while migrating mission-critical alerting systems, maintaining 99.99% availability.
Cost Optimization: Reduced cloud infrastructure costs by 35% via implementation of resource allocation strategies and automation.
experience.impact: Modernized mission-critical alerting systems, achieving 80% faster feature iteration and 35% cost savings while maintaining 99.99% availability.

experience.title: Backend Developer
experience.impact: Enhanced backend service stability and delivery reliability through standardized TDD and code quality metrics.

experience.title: Freelancer

aiRnD.note: The following represent prototypes/experiments and architectural research (not shipped production systems).
highlights: Developed cost-latency trade-off models for RAG pipelines, achieving a 30% reduction in token usage through refined prompt design and guardrails.
Designed agentic workflows with LangGraph and custom-built workflow systems; tuned hybrid retrieval (MongoDB/pgvector) and re-ranking layers.
Established evaluation frameworks for LLM safety: scenario-based A/B testing, hallucination mitigation patterns, and OpenTelemetry-based observability.

certifications: LeetCode: solved 500+ problems, focused on Hard-level algorithmic challenges and performance-critical data structures.
Certificate: Semi-Finalist of ACM Programming Contest in Georgia, November 2013
Certificate: High Achievement certificate of ACM Programming Contest, November 2013
